shows: The Mariscos German taco truck exterior with hand-painted seafood signage, order window, awning, and menu boards, customers seated at the counter
Gobernador-style seafood tostada topped with shrimp, raw oysters on the half shell, red onion, cilantro, and a lime wedge
Tostada loca piled with mixed ceviche (shrimp, octopus, fish), pata de mula clams on the shell, cilantro and red onion
Cup of the complimentary hot seafood consome broth served to waiting customers
Mar y tierra style grilled shrimp taco with charred bell pepper, onion, and tomato in a crispy shell
Close-up of the truck's hand-lettered menu board listing tacos, burritos, quesadillas, cocteles, tostadas, and caldos

Duplicate of photo6.jpg used in the dedicated Full Menu section: hand-lettered menu board with Spanish item names and an English translation panel (tacos, tacos al gusto, burritos, quesadillas, caldos, cocteles, tostadas, botanas)
